summary: Completed testing for Transmill major cleanup. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Verified removed features (labelview, telemedicina, internet) return 404, kept features (mobility, wallet, master) work correctly. Frontend code review confirms quick actions show Corrida/Lojas/Serviços/Carteira (no Proteção/Internet/Saúde) and promo banner shows Mobilidade/Lojas/Carteira (no removed features).

frontend_issues.notes: Preview environment showing loading screen - infrastructure issue, not code issue. React app compiles successfully, backend APIs working.

critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js (lines 273-277): Quick actions correctly show only Corrida, Lojas, Serviços, Carteira - NO Proteção, Internet, Saúde
HomePage.js (lines 329-353): Promo banner correctly shows only Mobilidade Transmill, Lojas Parceiras, Carteira Digital - NO removed features
master.py: Only contains business-segments and service-provider-types CRUD - internet-plans and telemedicine-plans removed
App.js: Routes for labelview, protecao, telemedicina, internet, social, chatbot have been removed. Some imports remain but are not used in routes.
Note: Some labelview-related imports still exist in App.js (LabelviewLogin, ClientesLabelviewPage, etc.) but no routes use them. Consider removing unused imports for cleaner code.

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - preview environment infrastructure issue

seed_data_creation: None required - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major cleanup verification complete. All removed features (labelview, telemedicina, internet, social, chatbot) correctly return 404. Kept features (mobility, wallet, master business-segments) working. Frontend code correctly updated - quick actions and promo banner show only kept features. Preview environment has infrastructure loading issue but code is correct.
